headline: Universal Health Services (NYSE:UHS): A Decent Value Play With Strong Profitability and a Rock-Bottom Valuation
summary: Universal Health Services (UHS) shows strong value with a 9/10 valuation rating, solid profitability, and decent growth. This healthcare operator is deeply undervalued but fundamentally sound, making it a compelling value stock worth further investigation.
